prompt: Wet coordinated flop, expensive continue price, and two risky streets still ahead: choose action.
why_v1: When the board already builds pressure and the price is poor, future streets make a weak continue worse instead of better.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The wet board, bad price, and future-street risk all push this spot toward release.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. A wet board, expensive price, and two risky streets ahead make folding cleaner than chasing a weak continue.
